data.title: Efficacy and Safety Prediction of Milrinone or Levosimendan as Initial Inotropic Drug Therapy in Patients With Acute and Advanced Heart Failure With Renal Insufficiency
data.brief_summary:
1. To evaluate the efficacy and safety of levosimendan and milrinone in the treatment of with acute heart failure with or without renal dysfunction;
2. Predictive modeling of the efficacy and safety of levosimendan and milrinone.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* 18-80 years old
* Patients who were clearly diagnosed with heart failure ( cardiac insufficiency ) and LVEF(Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction) \< 50 %, and were judged by the physician to need and agree to use levosimendan or milrinone to maintain hemodynamic stability

Exclu
